description: You are a DevOps engineer optimizing the developer experience for the Acme Stack. The current `docker-compose.yml` in `~/projects/acme-stack/` starts 9 containers by default, consuming unnecessary resources. Implement Docker Compose Profiles in `~/projects/acme-stack/docker-compose.yml` so that only the core services (`api`, `database`, `cache`) start by default. Assign the `gui` profile to `db-admin` and `cache-admin`, the `monitoring` profile to `prometheus` and `grafana`, the `test` profile to `test-runner`, and the `tools` profile to `db-seeder`. Do not change image tags or service names.
